Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and soundproofing. Free on-site parking is available, along with bicycle parking and bike hire.
Dining Options: Breakfast includes continental, buffet, Italian, full English/Irish, vegetarian, and gluten-free options with juice, fresh pastries, cheese, and fruits.
